site_index_policy: Use the target canonical top-N AU VRI median SI as the TIPSY input for every planted species SI column; retain parsed MP11 SI only as provenance.
au_policy: Generate only candidate rows that map to canonical top-N L/M/H AUs. TIPSY BEC zone/subzone and SI are emitted from the target AU VRI record, not from a standalone MP11 row-code decoder. Rows without a canonical top-N target AU remain blocked.
